data.content: Plan review approved by user. The plan is complete and feasible: it breaks the work into dispatch/API, overview dialog UX, and diagnostics slices; preserves advisory-only behavior; removes the clipped rail; replaces the freeform model textbox with configured dispatch-backed selection; adds first-class API routes for external agents; and covers the required lint, typecheck, test, build, and built-in browser verification gates.
